description: A supplier announces a 5% price increase on all their products, effective next month.

nodes.task_description: Receive the price increase notification from the supplier.
Update the cost for all of the supplier's products in the system, effective on the specified date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully schedules the price cost update.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the impact of the cost increase on profit margins.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs a report showing the margin impact.

nodes.task_description: Notify the sales and pricing teams so they can adjust customer pricing accordingly.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a notification to the relevant internal teams.
